turns.content:
## Mapping Complete

**Focus:** arch (deep DI/architecture analysis)

**Documents written:**
- `.planning/codebase/DI-ARCHITECTURE-ANALYSIS.md` (351 lines)

**Summary of findings:**

- **Primary pattern: EXPLICIT FACTORY INJECTION** — ~30+ tool/hook/feature instantiations all follow `createXxx(deps)`. **ONE consistent pattern with variants, not multiple competing patterns.**

| Layer | Pattern | Key Finding |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `plugin.ts` | Factory injection | Composition root with `setupDelegationModules()` standalone setup function |
| `tools/` | Factory injection (21 tools) | 5 dependency shapes: narrow interfaces, concrete classes, destructured objects, strings, none |
| `hooks/` | Factory injection | `HookDependencies` shared bundle (61 lines) + narrow consumer interfaces |
| `manager.ts` | Adapter/facade | Dual v1/v2 dispatch path — migration artifact |
| `session-tracker/` | Constructor + deferred init | Cleanup called immediately after init (anti-pattern) |
| `config/subscriber.ts` | **Module singleton** | Only global mutable state in the codebase |
| `command-engine/` | Pure function imports | Stateless — acceptable non-DI pattern |

**5 anti-patterns identified:** config singleton, fire-and-forget promise hygiene, cleanup-on-init, dual-facade temporal coupling, setupDelegationModules ref assignment. See document for details.

**Focus:** arch (deep DI/architecture analysis)

**Documents written:**
- `.planning/codebase/DI-ARCHITECTURE-ANALYSIS.md` (351 lines)

**Summary of findings:**

- **Primary pattern: EXPLICIT FACTORY INJECTION** — ~30+ tool/hook/feature instantiations all follow `createXxx(deps)`. **ONE consistent pattern with variants, not multiple competing patterns.**

| Layer | Pattern | Key Finding |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `plugin.ts` | Factory injection | Composition root with `setupDelegationModules()` standalone setup function |
| `tools/` | Factory injection (21 tools) | 5 dependency shapes: narrow interfaces, concrete classes, destructured objects, strings, none |
| `hooks/` | Factory injection | `HookDependencies` shared bundle (61 lines) + narrow consumer interfaces |
| `manager.ts` | Adapter/facade | Dual v1/v2 dispatch path — migration artifact |
| `session-tracker/` | Constructor + deferred init | Cleanup called immediately after init (anti-pattern) |
| `config/subscriber.ts` | **Module singleton** | Only global mutable state in the codebase |
| `command-engine/` | Pure function imports | Stateless — acceptable non-DI pattern |

**5 anti-patterns identified:** config singleton, fire-and-forget promise hygiene, cleanup-on-init, dual-facade temporal coupling, setupDelegationModules ref assignment. See document for details.
